# Size-guard allowlist (.github/workflows/size-guard.yml).
#
# One repo-relative path per line. A file listed here is exempt from the 5 MiB
# size-guard threshold. Add a path only with a clear reason in your PR
# description (why it must live in git rather than release assets / external
# storage / git-lfs). Keep this list short — it is the escape hatch, not the norm.
#
# (empty — no exemptions today; the largest committed fixture is ~2.8 MB)
